# Brand Voice & Tone — Test Brand

## Personality Traits

- Professional but approachable
- Clear and direct
- Helpful and empathetic
- Confident without being arrogant

## Tone Spectrum

| Context | Formality | Warmth | Directness |
|---------|-----------|--------|-----------|
| Marketing | Medium | High | High |
| Documentation | High | Medium | High |
| UI Microcopy | Medium | High | High |
| Error Messages | Medium | High | High |
| Social Media | Low | High | Medium |

## Vocabulary

### Approved Terms
- "We" and "you" (first/second person)
- "Start", "Create", "Build" (action verbs)
- "Simple", "Easy", "Fast"

### Forbidden Terms

| Term | Reason | Preferred Alternative |
|------|--------|-----------------------|
| "Just" | Condescending, dismissive | Omit entirely or use "Simply" |
| "Obviously" | Assumes knowledge | Omit entirely |
| "Synergy" | Jargon, meaningless | "Working together", "Collaboration" |

## Grammar & Formatting

- **Case:** Sentence case for UI, title case for marketing headlines
- **Voice:** Active voice
- **Contractions:** Allowed (you're, we're, it's)
- **Sentence length:** Short to medium (15-25 words ideal)
- **Paragraph structure:** 2-3 sentences max

## Before / After Examples

### Example 1 — Marketing Copy

**Before:** Our revolutionary platform leverages cutting-edge technology to optimize your workflow and drive synergistic outcomes across your organization.
**After:** Build better software, faster. Our platform gives your team the tools to ship with confidence.

### Example 2 — UI Microcopy

**Before:** Click here to proceed with the submission of your application.
**After:** Submit application

### Example 3 — Error Message

**Before:** An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again later.
**After:** Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

## Context-Specific Adaptations

### When addressing users directly
- Use "you" and "your"
- Frame features as what the user can accomplish

### When describing technical features
- Prefer plain language over jargon
- Explain the benefit before the mechanism

### When writing for social media
- Shorter sentences
- Questions and calls to engage
